HGSS.694.0001:
Hmm. If you transferred into my class,
I’d become the second-best student\r
in my class, wouldn’t I?\f
I want to get stronger before that
could happen, so would you trade phone\r
numbers with me?\f
Then we can have Pokémon
battles together! [0200,0000]
HGSS.694.0002:
Cool. I’ll give you a call when I’m
ready to battle again!\f
You can call me, too!
HGSS.694.0003:
Wait...don’t tell me you’re serious
about transferring into my school?!
HGSS.694.0004:
Hmm. If you transferred into my class,
I’d become the second-best student\r
in my class, wouldn’t I!\f
Before that happens, I want to battle
more with you so I can become much\r
stronger! Let’s trade phone numbers.\f
Then we can have Pokémon
battles together! [0200,0000]
HGSS.694.0005:
I want to give you something as thanks
for battling with me!\r
Here you go--have a Berry!\f
HGSS.694.0006:
Hm? Wait, where are you?
I’m pretty sure you’re nearby.\f
If you’re going to come all the way over
here, please feel free to approach me!
HGSS.694.0007:
You know, I’ve learned a lot from
watching you battle, and I’ve been\r
practicing with my [0100,000A,0000].\f
Thanks to you, we’ve improved a lot!\f
But even though we’ve grown stronger,
you’ve probably gotten stronger at\r
the same time, I guess.\f
So...that means we still won’t
be able to beat you, I guess!
HGSS.694.0008:
I used the tips I learned from watching
you battle to take down a wild\r
[0100,000B,0000] the other day!\f
Thanks to you, my Pokémon’s much
stronger!\f
If we get the chance to meet again,
I hope you’ll show me some more tricks!
HGSS.694.0009:
Hey, hey, listen up!\f
A few days ago, I was trying to catch a
wild [0100,000B,0000]...\f
We went down to the wire, but it
ended up getting away!\f
I really should have had a bunch of
Poké Balls ready, I know...
HGSS.694.0010:
You know, lately I’ve been wanting to
battle you again... What do you say?\f
Are you interested?
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.694.0011:
Hello? Didn’t we make plans to meet on
[0104,0003,0000] for a battle?\f
I’m sure you couldn’t have forgotten!
Get a move on, already!
HGSS.694.0012:
Hey, you know why I’m always in shorts?\f
It’s because they’re really cool!\f
You know how, if you scuff your knees
and you’re wearing shorts, everyone\r
can see all the bandages?\r
It makes me look wild and dangerous!
